description: Intent-only request: ask for the meaning of important emails instead of assuming rule-based or judgment-based handling.
processExpectations: The agent treats the meaning of important emails as underspecified.
The agent asks whether importance can be defined by deterministic rules or requires judgment.
The agent explains that rule-derivable importance would be a workflow while judged importance would be hybrid.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent or ask for clarification; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response asks for clarification and explains the rule-versus-judgment split.
